headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard defend card fee settlement
headlines.summary: Large merchants argued in a Monday court hearing that card surcharges and discounts would pose significant burdens on their businesses.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, settlement ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: XELA Robotics adds enhancements to uSkin sensor family ahead of Robotics Summit
headlines.summary: XELA Robotics will be showing its latest sensor technology at the Robotics Summit & Expo in Boston in May 2026.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Schaeffler plans to deploy 1,000 Hexagon humanoids by 2032
headlines.summary: Schaeffler is deepening its investment in humanoid robots in production through partnerships with Hexagon and VinDynamics.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle humanoid, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Flex and Teradyne expand partnership to scale physical AI
headlines.summary: Flex and Teradyne Robotics expanded their partnership to accelerate physical AI across global manufacturing facilities.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: Ford is raising its full-year profit outlook after a $1.3 billion tariff refund
political_items.summary: The automaker's adjusted EBIT more than tripled year-over-year, and it lifted its full-year earnings guidance by $500 million at the midpoint
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: DXC exec Chris Drumgoole explains how DXC OASIS helps companies as AI evolves
political_items.summary: DXC president Chris Drumgoole explains how DXC OASIS is helping companies navigate an increasingly AI-driven landscape

political_items.title: Jerome Powell says he will remain on the Fed board after stepping down as chair
political_items.summary: It would be a blow to Trump, who has mounted a relentless pressure campaign against Powell and would be deprived of the chance to nominate someone to replace him

political_items.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
political_items.summary: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.
